# Inspect a sample of hadith entries keys
hadith_db[0].keys(), hadith_db[0]

import re

def strip_diacritics(s):
    # remove Arabic diacritics
    diacritics = ''.join(chr(i) for i in range(0x0610, 0x061A+1)) + ''.join(chr(i) for i in range(0x064B, 0x065F+1)) + ''.join(chr(i) for i in range(0x0670, 0x0670+1))
    return re.sub('[%s]' % re.escape(diacritics), '', s)

def normalize_ar(s):
    s = s.replace('\u0640','')  # tatweel
    s = s.replace('إ','ا').replace('أ','ا').replace('آ','ا')
    s = s.replace('ى','ي')
    s = s.replace('ؤ','و').replace('ئ','ي')
    s = s.replace('ة','ه')
    s = s.replace('ٱ','ا')
    s = s.replace('ـ','')
    s = strip_diacritics(s)
    s = re.sub(r'[^\u0600-\u06FF\s]+',' ', s)  # remove non-Arabic letters and punctuation
    s = re.sub(r'\s+',' ', s).strip()
    return s

def norm_all(s):
    return normalize_ar(s)

orig_full = "ا تَزَوَّجَنَّ أُختَيَّ"
